name: 14th Lowland
excerpt: The 14th Lowland is a provincial infantry regiment known for labor and construction duties.
notes: The 14th Lowland is a provincial infantry regiment where Dellan Moor served for four years. The regiment was primarily used for labor and construction, which provided Dellan with practical skills. Sable Voss was a supply administrator in the same regiment. Dellan and Sable deserted from this regiment together.
